dash.disclaimer: Windows scheduler latency proxy (not FPS / not ping). Success = lower idle baseline; MAX may rise with mouse/UI.
dash.chart.title: Latency history
dash.chart.hint: Chart = median. MAX is on the card. UI clicks cause spikes (noise), not a profile reset. Keep in tray while gaming.
dash.first.run.hint: A short benchmark will suggest a profile with explanations.
mon.chart.title: Latency history
mon.log.title: HIGH LATENCY LOG
profiles.list.title: PROFILES
profiles.custom.name: Custom {0}
profiles.custom.desc: Your own settings. Edit toggles on the Dashboard or apply and fine-tune.
profiles.delete.only.custom: Only custom profiles can be deleted. Built-in (Default, Gaming, Office) are protected.
profiles.delete.confirm: Delete profile “{0}”? This cannot be undone.
plugins.title: PLUGINS
plugins.subtitle: Core modules + optional extensions. External DLLs go in /plugins
plugins.help: Core modules follow Dashboard toggles. Extensions (network, priority) are opt-in: enable, save flags, then Apply. Drop DLLs into /plugins next to the EXE.
plugin.timer.name: Timer resolution
plugin.timer.desc: NtSetTimerResolution hold — high impact on scheduling jitter. Applied by core profile.
plugin.power.name: Power & core activity
plugin.power.desc: High Performance, min CPU, ASPM off, all cores active. Core profile.
plugin.gpu.name: GPU / HAGS / low latency
plugin.gpu.desc: HAGS + driver low-latency registry. Medium impact; reboot may be needed.
plugin.net.name: Network / MMCSS
plugin.net.desc: Best-effort MMCSS Games task priorities. Not CoDel/UDP. Opt-in.
plugin.net.mmcss.tip: Raises multimedia scheduler priority for Games. Low–medium; reboot may help.
plugin.prio.name: Process priority High
plugin.prio.desc: Sets AntiLag process to High while optimizing. Experimental / low.
tip.timer.title: Timer resolution (0.5–1.0 ms)
tip.timer.benefit: Lowers Sleep/timer jitter and stabilizes frame pacing. Windows 11 22H2+ is per-process.
tip.timer.tradeoff: Higher CPU power use (more timer interrupts).
tip.power.title: High / Ultimate Performance
tip.power.benefit: Less aggressive C-states and throttling — CPU reacts faster to load.
tip.power.tradeoff: Runs hotter and louder; drains battery faster.
tip.cores.title: All cores active (disable Core Parking)
tip.cores.benefit: Cores stay awake — lower latency on sudden load (games, audio).
tip.cores.tradeoff: Higher laptop temps. On hybrid CPUs you can leave E-cores parked.
tip.gamemode.title: Game Mode + disable Game DVR
tip.gamemode.benefit: Game Mode prioritizes the foreground game; DVR often causes micro-stutter.
tip.gamemode.tradeoff: No Xbox Game Bar clip capture.
tip.hags.title: HAGS (Hardware-accelerated GPU Scheduling)
tip.hags.benefit: GPU schedules its own work — lower latency on DX12/Vulkan (driver-dependent).
tip.hags.tradeoff: May hurt stability on old drivers; reboot required.
tip.gpu.title: GPU Low Latency / Reflex / Anti-Lag
tip.gpu.benefit: Shortens the frame queue between CPU and GPU (input → display).
tip.gpu.tradeoff: Prefer in-game toggles; registry is best-effort without NVAPI SDK.
tip.mem.title: Empty working set
tip.mem.benefit: Frees RAM from background processes when memory is tight.
tip.mem.tradeoff: Does not cut input lag directly; brief stalls when pages are touched again.
tip.backup.title: Restore point + JSON backup
tip.backup.benefit: AntiLag Next saves values and (when possible) a restore point before changes.
tip.backup.tradeoff: Windows quota often limits restore points to 1 / 24 h — JSON backup still runs.
settings.build: BUILD (verify path — use this EXE only)
settings.language.hint: Language packs: i18n folder next to the EXE (ru.json, en.json).
settings.restore.desc: System Restore + JSON backup before apply
tray.balloon.title: AntiLag Next
tray.balloon.text: Running in tray. Timer resolution is held by this process.
tray.exit.confirm.keep: Exit? Timer resolution will remain until the process ends.
confirm.reset.title: Reset all optimizations?
confirm.reset.body: This will release the timer, restore power/registry settings from safety state, and mark optimizations as off. Continue?
backups.empty: No backups yet. They appear after you apply optimizations.
mon.spikes.empty: No high-latency events yet. Spikes appear when median exceeds the yellow threshold.
